meta.title: Kazakhstan Entrepreneurs Association — the national business union
meta.description: The Kazakhstan Entrepreneurs Association unites the country's business community, protects entrepreneurs' interests, and develops Kazakhstan's business environment.

hero.title: The national association uniting Kazakhstan's entrepreneurs
hero.subtitle: A professional platform built to protect, develop and support business

about.title: An independent union of Kazakhstan's entrepreneurs
about.who: The Kazakhstan Entrepreneurs Association is an independent public union representing business interests nationwide — from startups to large holdings.
about.history: The Association was founded by entrepreneurs who came together to systematically protect business, share expertise, and jointly develop the country's business climate.
about.goals: Uniting entrepreneurs, attracting investment, developing the entrepreneurial environment and increasing the international competitiveness of Kazakhstani companies.
about.tasks: Protecting business interests, expert support, export development, digitalization, educational programs and international cooperation.
benefits: Participation in business missions and forums
Access to market analytics and research
Representation of interests at the state level

mission.title: Unite, protect, develop
mission.text: To unite Kazakhstan's entrepreneurs, provide expert support to business, protect the interests of the entrepreneurial community, develop business culture, and promote investment, innovation and the country's sustainable economic development.

items.name: Professionalism
items.desc: An expert approach in every project and consultation.

items.name: Independence
items.desc: An objective stance in protecting business interests.

items.name: Transparency
items.desc: Openness in working with members and partners.

items.name: Responsibility
items.desc: Commitments to the country's business community.

items.name: Entrepreneurship development
items.desc: Supporting business at every stage of growth.

items.name: International cooperation
items.desc: Connections with foreign partners and markets.

items.name: Business protection
items.desc: Representing entrepreneurs' interests before the state.

items.name: Export
items.desc: Developing the export potential of Kazakhstani companies.

items.name: Education
items.desc: Courses, seminars and professional development programs.

items.name: Digitalization
items.desc: Implementing AI, CRM and ERP solutions in business.

items.name: Regional development
items.desc: Supporting entrepreneurship in every region of the country.

ai.title: The Association's digital consultant
ai.subtitle: This section is ready for OpenAI API integration and will help entrepreneurs get instant answers.
ai.placeholder: E.g.: which department can help with exporting my product?
